BackstoryDef.title: Clown
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked aboard a hyper-advanced research space station as a clown. [PAWN_nameDef] was an expert in their craft, bringing joy to anyone who watched [PAWN_possessive] performances or pranks. [PAWN_nameDef]'s contract was cut short due to the research station they were assigned to being abandoned due to hostile enemy corporation sabotage.
